product_overview: Science Hub is a learning platform for first-year science students combining course content, session tracking, push notifications, and an AI "DaVinci" tutor. The backend exposes authenticated and public APIs for chat, courses, feedback, uploads, push subscriptions, cron triggers, and session tracking.
core_goals: Provide secure session management with single-session enforcement and server-side validation.
Deliver an AI-powered tutor (DaVinci) with conversation history and rate limiting.
Expose course data with graceful fallback to mock data when DB is unavailable.
Allow students to submit and admins to moderate feedback with rate limits and RBAC.
Support web push subscriptions and cron-triggered reminders for scheduled classes.
Track study sessions (start/heartbeat/end) including sendBeacon support for accurate duration capture.
Securely accept image uploads to Supabase Storage with validation and size limits.

features.name: Authentication & Session Management
features.description: Validate and enforce JWT sessions, detect single-session eviction (kicked sessions), and surface session validity to clients.
user_flows: GET /api/auth/check-session with valid sciencehub_session cookie -> Receive 200 with {valid: true, user: SessionUser}
GET /api/auth/check-session with expired/invalid cookie -> Receive 401 with {valid: false, reason: string}
GET /api/auth/check-session when rate limit exceeded -> Receive 429 with {valid: false, reason: 'rate_limited'}
GET /api/auth/check-session with cookie that was revoked by a new session (kicked) -> Receive 401 with {valid: false, reason: 'kicked'}

features.name: AI Chat (DaVinci Science Tutor)
features.description: Send messages and conversation history to a Gemini-powered tutor and receive AI responses, with per-user rate limiting and quota handling.
user_flows: GET /api/auth/check-session with valid sciencehub_session cookie -> Receive 200 with {valid: true, user: SessionUser} -> POST /api/chat with body {message: 'Explain photosynthesis', history: [...] } and cookie -> Receive 200 with {response: string}
GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie -> Receive 200 -> POST /api/chat with body {message: '', history: [...] } and cookie -> Receive 400 Bad body or empty message
GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie -> Receive 200 -> POST /api/chat with body {message: '...', history: [...] } and cookie when user exceeded rate limit -> Receive 429 Rate limited

GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie -> Receive 200 -> POST /api/chat with body {message: '...', history: [...] } and cookie when Gemini quota unavailable -> Receive 503 Quota exceeded or unavailable

features.name: Courses API
features.description: Public endpoint to retrieve the list of courses, with optional semester filtering and mock-data fallback if the database is unavailable.
user_flows: GET /api/courses?semester=1 (no auth required) -> Receive 200 with Course[] filtered by semester
GET /api/courses (no auth required) -> Receive 200 with Course[] (DB reachable)
GET /api/courses (no auth required) during DB failure -> Receive 200 with Course[] returned from mock data as fallback
GET /api/courses?semester=invalid (no auth required) -> Receive 400 or 422 for invalid query parameter

features.name: Feedback System
features.description: Authenticated users can submit feedback (bug, idea, question) rate-limited per user; admins (super_admin) can list, update, and delete entries.
user_flows: GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie -> Receive 200 -> POST /api/feedback with body {type: 'bug', title: 'Crash on save', description: '...'} and cookie -> Receive 200 {success: true, data: Feedback}

GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie -> Receive 200 -> POST /api/feedback with body {type: 'idea', title: 'X', description: 'Y'} and cookie when user exceeded 5 submissions/hour -> Receive 429 Rate limited
GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie -> Receive 200 -> GET /api/feedback?status=open&type=bug and cookie -> Receive 200 with Feedback[] (user sees own entries; super_admin sees all)
GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie but non-super_admin -> Receive 200 -> PATCH /api/feedback/{id} with body {status: 'closed', admin_notes: '...'} and cookie -> Receive 403 Not super_admin
GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie as super_admin -> Receive 200 -> PATCH /api/feedback/{id} with body {status: 'triaged'} and cookie -> Receive 200 {success: true, data: Feedback}
GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie as super_admin -> Receive 200 -> DELETE /api/feedback/{id} and cookie -> Receive 200 {success: true}
GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie but non-super_admin -> Receive 200 -> DELETE /api/feedback/{id} and cookie -> Receive 403 Not super_admin

features.name: Push Notifications
features.description: Manage web push subscription lifecycle (get VAPID key, subscribe, unsubscribe) and trigger push sends via a protected cron/send endpoint.
user_flows: GET /api/push/subscribe (public) -> Receive 200 {publicKey: string} -> POST /api/push/subscribe with cookie and body {subscription: PushSubscription, section_id: 'abc'} -> Receive 200 {success: true}
POST /api/push/subscribe without auth cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
DELETE /api/push/subscribe with cookie and body {endpoint: 'https://...'} -> Receive 200 {success: true}
POST /api/push/send with valid bearer secret -> Receive 200 {success: true, sent: number}
POST /api/push/send without bearer secret or invalid token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Cron Schedule Notifications
features.description: Cron-protected endpoint that triggers in-app class reminder notifications (15 and 5 minutes before classes); accepts GET or POST and requires a Vercel cron header or bearer secret.
user_flows: GET /api/cron/schedule-notify with valid Vercel cron header -> Receive 200 {success: true, notifications_sent: number}
GET /api/cron/schedule-notify without cron header or invalid bearer secret -> Receive 401 Unauthorized
POST /api/cron/schedule-notify with valid cron header (delegates to GET handler) -> Receive 200 {success: true, notifications_sent: number}

features.name: Session Tracking
features.description: Endpoint to end active study sessions (used by sendBeacon on page unload) that computes session duration and gracefully handles missing sessions.
user_flows: POST /api/tracking/end with body {session_id: 'uuid'} (sendBeacon, no auth required) -> Receive 200 {success: true}
POST /api/tracking/end with body {session_id: 'nonexistent'} (sendBeacon) -> Receive 404 Session not found

features.name: File Upload
features.description: Authenticated image upload endpoint that enforces file type whitelists (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp), blocks SVG/HTML, and enforces a 5MB size limit before storing in Supabase Storage.
user_flows: GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie -> Receive 200 -> POST /api/upload with multipart/form-data image (jpg, <5MB) and cookie -> Receive 200 {url: string}
GET /api/auth/check-session with valid cookie -> Receive 200 -> POST /api/upload with multipart/form-data file of type 'image/svg+xml' and cookie -> Receive 400 No file, too large, or wrong type
POST /api/upload without auth cookie -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Authentication & Session Management
features.description: Login/logout with JWT sessions, single-session enforcement, password changes, and session validation

endpoints.description: Validates user's current JWT session against database, enforces single-session policy, detects kicked sessions

features.name: AI Chat (DaVinci Science Tutor)
features.description: AI chat powered by Gemini 2.0 Flash acting as DaVinci science tutor with conversation history

endpoints.description: Send message to AI tutor and get response, supports conversation history

features.name: Courses API
features.description: Public endpoint to list all courses with optional semester filtering and mock data fallback

endpoints.description: List all courses, optionally filtered by semester. Falls back to mock data if DB fails.

response_schema.200: Course[] with id, name, description, semester, etc.

features.name: Feedback System
features.description: Submit and manage user feedback (bugs, ideas, questions) with admin moderation

endpoints.description: Submit feedback with type, title, and description. Rate limited to 5/hour per user.
Get feedback entries. Users see own, super_admin sees all. Max 50 results.
Update feedback status and admin notes. Super_admin only.
Delete a feedback entry. Super_admin only.

features.name: Push Notifications
features.description: Web Push notification subscription management and cron-triggered sending for class reminders

endpoints.description: Returns VAPID public key for client-side push subscription setup
Subscribe to push notifications for a section
Unsubscribe from push notifications by endpoint
Cron-triggered push notification sender for class reminders. Requires bearer token.

features.name: Cron Schedule Notifications
features.description: Cron endpoint to trigger in-app class reminder notifications 15 and 5 minutes before classes

endpoints.description: Triggers in-app class reminder notifications. Requires Vercel cron header or bearer secret.
POST variant that delegates to GET handler

features.name: Session Tracking
features.description: Track active user sessions with start/heartbeat/end lifecycle and sendBeacon support

endpoints.description: End an active session when user closes tab. Called via sendBeacon. Computes session duration.

features.name: File Upload
features.description: Upload images to Supabase Storage with file type validation, size limits, and extension whitelist

endpoints.description: Upload an image to Supabase Storage. Max 5MB, images only (jpg, jpeg, png, gif, webp). SVG/HTML blocked.

response_schema.400: No file, too large, or wrong type

known_limitations.issue: Tracking end endpoint has no authentication since it uses sendBeacon which cannot carry session cookies
In-memory rate limiting resets on server restart
known_limitations.impact: Rate limits not persistent across deployments in dev mode

known_limitations.issue: Courses endpoint has no caching headers
known_limitations.impact: Every request hits the database (with mock fallback)
